title: Theodorea caespitosa

It belongs to the genus Theodorea, which is a part of the order Magnoliales. Theodorea caespitosa is native to tropical regions, specifically in Central America. Further classification of Theodorea caespitosa may be based on its specific characteristics and phylogenetic relationships.
